allow: Bash(npx --yes shadcn@latest add input label textarea select radio-group card table badge sonner separator -y)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\),path=require\('path'\);const skip=new Set\(['node_modules','.next','.git','Approved  data','Templates','.swc']\);function walk\(d,p\){let o='';const es=fs.readdirSync\(d,{withFileTypes:true}\).filter\(e=>!skip.has\(e.name\)\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>\(a.isDirectory\(\)===b.isDirectory\(\)\)?a.name.localeCompare\(b.name\):\(a.isDirectory\(\)?-1:1\)\);for\(const e of es\){o+=p+e.name+\(e.isDirectory\(\)?'/':''\)+'\\n';if\(e.isDirectory\(\)\)o+=walk\(path.join\(d,e.name\),p+'  '\);}return o;}process.stdout.write\(walk\('.',''\)\);")
